title: The Office REIT Conundrum
text: Many, if not most, corporate American CEOs are still very much about encouraging office culture. They can accept a hybrid schedule, with employees working from home sometimes. But they still ultimately want an office for everyone to commune in several times a week.

title: A Historic Opportunity To Win Big With Dividend Stocks
text: Dividend stocks are today offering a historic opportunity. Share prices are down and dividend yields are now materially higher. We show the huge difference that it can make over the long run.

title: Is Boston Properties (BXP) a Potential Value Trap? An In-depth Analysis
text: With a recent daily gain of 3.55%, Boston Properties Inc ( BXP , Financial) presents an interesting case for value investors. Given its Earnings Per Share (EPS) (EPS) of $4.99, the question arises: is Boston Properties a potential value trap?

title: 3 REITs I'm Avoiding And 1 REIT I Love For H2 2023
text: The first half of 2023 was marked by an increase in the S&P 500. A handful of stocks drove the gains. I now expect REITs to take over. Here are three I'm avoiding and one I like a lot.

title: Boston Properties (BXP) to Post Q2 Earnings: What's in Store?
text: While solid demand for Boston Properties' (BXP) premier office & life-science assets is likely to have aided its Q2 earnings, a choppy U.S. office market and high interest expenses might have ailed.

title: REITs To Buy As Inflation Plunges And Before Interest Rates Follow
text: Predicting short-term trends in the CPI and how the Fed will react is very different than predicting macroeconomic developments like recessions. With the CPI about to plunge sharply, interest rates are nearly certain to follow. This article explores how you might profit.

title: Is This High-Yield Stock Warning About a Dividend Cut?
text: Boston Properties is one of the largest office landlords in the U.S. It has managed to hold its dividend steady through the shift to work from home. Management seems to be warning investors that a dividend cut could be coming.

title: 5 Buy Alerts: The Billionaires Are Wrong, This Is The Next Big Market Move
text: With the latest inflation data it seems that we're at an interesting inflection point in markets, confirming my original views. Of all sectors, one in particular offers fantastic risk-reward at current levels. Here are 5 of our top picks in the sector.

title: Mom's All-Weather REIT Portfolio (Part 1)
text: This article was targeted for my mother who is looking to put some dry powder to work so she can take advantage of the opportunities in the REIT sector. The article is the first in a two-part series such that my Mom can use this blueprint for her new REIT portfolio. The objective is to construct a diversified portfolio of 20 REITs that consists of some of the highest-quality REITs that are trading at a wide margin of safety.

title: Are Dividend-Paying Office REITs Finally Staging A Comeback?
text: If you haven't exactly been monitoring the performance of office-building investments, that's understandable. With offices sitting empty as employees prefer to work from home, the biggest real estate investment trusts, Alexandria Real Estate Equities NYSE: ARE, Boston Properties NYSE: BXP, Corporate Office Properties Trust NYSE: OFC, Kilroy Realty NYSE: KRC and Vornado Realty Trust NYSE: VNO were among the most-beaten down equities in the past 15 months.

title: Boston Properties: Don't Listen To The Doomsayers, It Is Here To Stay
text: Boston Properties Inc., an office property REIT, should be able to navigate the post-COVID landscape and the proliferation of new working arrangements with its cash flow-generating abilities intact. The company is focusing on the attractive life sciences industry. By 2026, Boston Properties expects its life sciences property portfolio to represent over 13% of its total annualized rental obligations. Boston Properties' portfolio leased rate stood at 91.0% at the end of March 2023, as its focus on high-growth metropolitan areas has helped shield its portfolio.

title: BXP to Release Second Quarter 2023 Financial Results on August 1, 2023
text: BOSTON--(BUSINESS WIRE)--BXP (NYSE: BXP), the largest publicly traded developer, owner, and manager of premier workplaces in the United States, announced today that it will release financial results for the second quarter on Tuesday, August 1, 2023, after the close of trading on the NYSE. BXP will host a conference call and webcast on Wednesday, August 2, 2023, at 10:00 A.M. Eastern Time, to discuss the financial results and provide an update on BXP. Participants who would like to join the call.

title: REITs Lead Quarter-End Rally
text: U.S. equity markets closed-out a volatile first-half at their highest-levels of the year as investors cheered data showing continued resilience in economic activity alongside further signs of cooling inflationary pressure. Rebounding from its worst week since March, the S&P 500 advanced 2.3% to close at its highest-levels since April 2022. The Mid-Cap 400 and Small-Cap 600 each rallied over 4%. Lifted by a recovery in the most beaten-down property sectors, real estate equities led the rally on the week. The Equity REIT Index advanced 4.3% while Mortgage REITs surged 6%.
